KATHMANDU, Dec 17: Reman Bala, a resident of Baluwatar bagged the winner of the ‘6th National Astronomy Olympiad 2019 Logo Competition’.  Bala’s logo was the best among a total of 83 logos, according to a press statement issued by National Astronomy society (NASO).

The winner will be conferred with cash prize worth Rs 5,000 and certificate in a special program to be hosted in Kathmandu. The logo will be the official logo of 6th National Astronomy Olympiad.

NASO has been creating a strong scientific community within the country since 2013.
